## 🚀 Showcase Submission

Thank you for submitting your project that uses **soundcn**!  
Please fill out the details below.

---

## 📦 Basic Information

**title:**  
<!-- Project title -->

**description (optional):**  
<!-- Short description of the project -->

---

## 👤 Author

**author:**  
<!-- Your name or nickname -->

**authorUrl (optional):**  
<!-- Link to your website / GitHub / profile -->

---

## 🌍 Project Links

**projectUrl:**  
<!-- Live project URL -->

**videoSrc:**  
<!-- /showcases/*.mp4 OR external video URL -->

**posterSrc (optional):**  
<!-- Thumbnail image URL -->

---

## 🔊 Sounds Used

**sounds:**  
<!-- List the sounds used in this showcase (ShowcaseSound[]) -->
<!-- Example format: -->

```json
[
  {
    "id": "click-01",
    "name": "Soft Click"
  }
]
